title: : Intelligent Process Automation Specialist
description:
Role Purpose (MCF Summary)

The Intelligent Process Automation Specialist is responsible for leading and delivering automation and AI-enabled initiatives that improve operational efficiency, strengthen control environments, and enhance ease of doing business within Private Banking. The role acts as a key interface between business stakeholders and technology teams, ensuring automation solutions are delivered in line with governance, risk, and regulatory standards.

Key Accountabilities & Responsibilities (MCF-Aligned)

Business & Delivery Accountability

  • Lead end-to-end Intelligent Process Automation initiatives, including RPA, workflow, chatbot, AI, and cognitive automation solutions.

  • Identify, shape, and prioritise automation opportunities aligned with business strategy and operational excellence objectives.

  • Own the automation pipeline, translating business use cases into clear, structured requirements and supporting solution design and delivery.

  • Ensure solutions are fit-for-purpose, scalable, and deliver measurable efficiency and control benefits.

Governance, Risk & Control

  • Ensure all automation initiatives comply with internal governance standards, control frameworks, and applicable regulatory requirements.

  • Identify, manage, and escalate project risks, dependencies, and issues in a timely and transparent manner.

  • Support operational oversight of live automations, including incident management, issue resolution, and user communications.

  • Contribute to strong documentation standards (as-is / to-be processes, requirements, controls, and audit trail).

Stakeholder & Change Management

  • Act as the primary business representative and liaison between business stakeholders and technical delivery teams.

  • Manage senior and working-level stakeholders across functions, ensuring alignment on scope, priorities, and outcomes.

  • Coordinate UAT, business readiness, and change management activities to ensure smooth adoption and transition to production.

  • Provide structured updates, reports, and presentations to management and governance forums.

Leadership & Culture

  • Demonstrate strong ownership, accountability, and proactive problem-solving.

  • Foster a culture of innovation, continuous improvement, and responsible use of AI and automation technologies.

  • Act as a collaborative team player, contributing to cross-functional alignment and shared outcomes.

Regulatory Responsibilities & Conduct Expectations

The role holder is expected to:

  • Act with honesty, integrity, and professionalism at all times.

  • Exercise due care, skill, and diligence in the delivery of automation initiatives.

  • Manage conflicts of interest appropriately and treat stakeholders and customers fairly.

  • Maintain ongoing competence through continuous learning, particularly in AI and automation trends.

  • Ensure effective risk management and compliance with applicable laws, regulations, and internal policies.

Key Risks Managed by the Role

  • Operational risk arising from poorly designed or inadequately governed automations

  • Change and adoption risk impacting business continuity

  • Data, control, and compliance risks associated with AI and automation solutions

  • Delivery and dependency risks across multi-stakeholder initiatives

Decision-Making Authority

  • Prioritisation and shaping of automation use cases within agreed governance frameworks

  • Escalation of risks, issues, and control concerns to appropriate forums

  • Recommendations on solution design, delivery approach, and adoption strategy

postedCompany.description:
Tekishub Consulting Services was established in 2008 in Wilmington Delaware, from this beginning the company has grown exponentially to include services and support locations across United States, Canada, India and the Singapore. TekisHub has ambitious plans to expand base in Australia, Middle East, APAC, United Kingdom next. With consultants deployed “on projects” worldwide, Tekishub brings together the right people and technologies to deliver the results to our clients.

Our executive team combines highly experienced members who help in providing technology and business consulting services to clients Globally. From a single expert consultant to an entire project team, Tekishub provides customized resource solutions through its project deliverable based and contingent workforce service options.
postedCompany.name: TEKISHUB CONSULTING SERVICES PTE. LTD.
